meta.title: DNA Relatedness among Some Thermophilic Members of the Genus Methanobacterium: Emendation of the Species Methanobacterium thermoautotrophicum and Rejection of Methanobacterium thermoformicicum as a Synonym of Methanobacterium thermoautotrophicum
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology
